app.tagline: Terminal workbench with built-in AI copilot
app.browserDevPreview: Browser dev preview (mock Electron API). Use DevTools for styling; run

sandbox.title: JS Sandbox
sandbox.emptyHint: Enter JavaScript below and run. Supports console.log, expressions, and more.
sandbox.inputHint: Enter to run, Shift+Enter for newline, ↑/↓ for history, Tab to complete

filesystem.title: Local file system
filesystem.openVsCodeFailed: VS Code not found. Configure or detect the path in Settings.
filesystem.openCursorFailed: Cursor not found. Configure or detect the path in Settings.
filesystem.alreadyInFavorites: This folder is already in favorites

repo.listDesc: Manage local Git repositories, history, and branches
repo.cloneDesc: Clone a remote repository to a local directory
repo.clonePathPlaceholder: Directory + repo name after you browse
repo.cloneInvalidUrl: Enter a valid Git URL (https or git protocol)
repo.notGitRepo: The selected folder is not a Git repository
repo.duplicateRepo: This repository is already in the list
repo.removeConfirmDesc: Remove "{{name}}" from the list. The folder on disk will not be deleted.
repo.graphModuleError: Failed to load commit graph component
repo.graphLoadError: Failed to load commit graph data
repo.diffApiMissing: Diff API not ready — fully restart the app
repo.noChangedFiles: No file changes in this commit
repo.selectCommitHint: Select a commit in the graph to view details
repo.gitNotFoundBanner: Git was not found. Configure git.exe in Settings → File system.

session.title: Session management
session.searchPlaceholder: Search by project, title, or time…
session.toolNotEnabled: Session management for this AI tool is not enabled. Enable it in Settings → Manage sessions.

errors.fileNotFound: Session list file not found. Check the Claude Code history path in settings.

workspace.gitNotSupported: Git was not found or this directory is not a repository
workspace.notGitRepo: Working directory is not a Git repository
workspace.commitDesc: Enter a commit message and choose which files to include in this commit.
workspace.closeConfirmDesc: This will terminate the workspace terminal session. Terminal state will not be preserved.

agent.title: NioZy Agent
agent.description: A conversational agent workspace inspired by the Codex layout.
agent.emptyTitle: What should we build in NioZy?
agent.emptyDescription: Choose a project directory, confirm the model and mode, then start chatting.
agent.inputPlaceholder: Describe your task. Use @ to search files, Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a newline

errors.workspaceRequired: Choose a project directory before sending a message

titleBar.connectivityCheckDesc: Test reachability to a host and port using TCP/UDP probes.
titleBar.connectivityCheckPortIcmpHint: ICMP does not use a port; the port field is ignored.
titleBar.searchHint: Search within the active terminal output. Enter: next, Shift+Enter: previous.
titleBar.snapHint: Hover to choose a snap layout; click to snap the window
titleBar.renderModeDomOnlyHint: Ghostty / Wterm only support DOM rendering

commandReplay.noActiveTerminal: Open and select a terminal tab first
commandReplay.replayHint: Click to replay in the active terminal

reminder.fieldRepeatDesc: Schedules the next reminder automatically; after today’s alert it shows as done and stays in the list

aiSidebar.title: AI Assistant
aiSidebar.welcome: How can I help you today?
aiSidebar.welcomeNoKey: Configure an API key under Settings → AI features.
aiSidebar.configureKey: Configure your OpenAI API key in Settings → AI features first
aiSidebar.attachmentInputNotReady: Attachment input is not ready. Reopen the AI sidebar and try again.

focus.label: Focus
focus.description: Sidebar collapsed by default for terminal focus

minimal.label: Minimal
minimal.description: No sidebar; terminal icon tabs under the title bar

minimal.label: Minimal
minimal.description: Warm neutral grays, hairline borders, flat cards, restrained typography

niozy.label: NioZy
niozy.description: Original blue/cyan accents, card shadows, and colorful status tags

windowsClassic.label: Windows Classic
windowsClassic.description: Windows XP Luna nostalgia: blue title bar, 3D borders, Tahoma sizing, sunken panels

waFu.description: Japanese wa-fu: washi warm ivory, sakura pink accents, indigo and matcha presets, soft borders

cyberpunk.label: Cyberpunk
cyberpunk.description: Neon cyberpunk: Cyber2077 yellow/cyan/magenta, dark grid backdrop, glow borders, uppercase headings

glass.label: Glass
glass.description: Semi-transparent glass: frosted see-through panels, neutral gradient backdrop, fine light borders, soft depth

claude.label: Claude
claude.description: Claude editorial style: warm cream #F4F1EA, coral accent, global Noto Serif UI font, 12px radius

neumorphism.label: Neumorphism
neumorphism.description: Neumorphism Soft UI: low-saturation gray-blue monochrome, dual-shadow emboss, borderless panels, accent color only on active states and primary buttons

assistive.title: Assistive
assistive.description: Toggle title bar entries and helper tools
assistive.pomodoroEnabledDesc: When on, show the Pomodoro button in the title bar; when off, hide it
assistive.commandReplayEnabledDesc: When off, hide the Commands entry and disable record/replay
assistive.terminalSearchEnabledDesc: When off, hide the search entry and disable the search dialog
assistive.connectivityCheckEnabledDesc: When off, hide the connectivity check entry in the title bar
assistive.screenshotEnabledDesc: When off, hide the screenshot entry and disable screenshot capture
assistive.screenshotHideSelfDesc: When on, temporarily hide the NioZy main window while capturing so it is not included in the screenshot
assistive.notesEnabledDesc: Show Notes button and manage notes (stored at config directory note.json)

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: UI style, theme, layout, language, accent color, and global font size
appearance.showAppTitleDesc: When off, the title bar shows only the icon, not the NioZy name
appearance.enableDynamicTitleDesc: Rotates the title bar label between NioZy, Terminal, Workspace, and AI Agent
appearance.enableDialogAnimationsDesc: When on, dialogs (including image preview) fade in from below and fade out downward
appearance.enableGlassTransparencyDesc: Only applies to the Glass interface style: enhances dialogs, buttons, and the overall UI with macOS-like frosted glass
appearance.enableWindowsNativeEffectDesc: Windows only, works with any interface style: uses the native Acrylic/Mica backdrop (mutually exclusive with Transparency; Mica requires Windows 11, auto-downgrades to Acrylic on older builds)
appearance.windowsNativeEffectIntensityDesc: Adjusts the opacity of sidebar / title-bar cards: higher levels are more opaque with clearer text; lower levels are more transparent to let the desktop wallpaper show through
appearance.enableSmoothFontsDesc: Enables HiDPI support and DirectWrite smoothing for macOS-like text rendering (restart required)
appearance.enableSmoothScrollingDesc: Enables native Chromium smooth scrolling and animates the xterm viewport scroll (restart required)
appearance.enableStatusPanelDesc: Shows a handle on the right edge; drag left to reveal cards with system info, resource usage, terminals, and AI settings

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.description: Color scheme, font, cursor, and renderer
terminal.useBuiltinFontDesc: When on, the built-in Nerd Font Mono overrides the system font above for terminal rendering
terminal.ligaturesDesc: Enables the xterm ligatures addon so Nerd Fonts can render programming ligatures such as =>, ===, and !=
terminal.ligaturesWtermDesc: The current terminal engine does not support the xterm ligatures addon. Switch back to Xterm to enable it.
terminal.cursorBlinkDesc: When off, the cursor stays still
terminal.hideCursorDesc: Do not draw the host terminal cursor; useful when tools like Claude Code render their own cursor
terminal.rendererDesc: xterm uses DOM by default; addon-webgl enables WebGL rendering.
terminal.rendererWtermDesc: Wterm is active and only supports DOM rendering. Switch back to Xterm for DOM or WebGL.
terminal.synchronizedOutputDesc: Enables xterm.js 6 DEC 2026 synchronized output for flicker-free TUI updates (reopen terminal tabs to apply).
terminal.synchronizedOutputWtermDesc: Wterm does not support synchronized output. Switch back to Xterm to enable.
terminal.scrollbackDesc: Number of lines kept for scroll-up history (xterm scrollback)
terminal.rightClickCopyPasteDesc: Copy when text is selected; paste when nothing is selected
terminal.advancedRightClickMenuDesc: Show a terminal context menu on right-click (copy, paste, search, export, replay, etc.). Mutually exclusive with right-click copy/paste
terminal.backgroundDesc: Set a local image as the terminal background. The file is stored as bg.<ext> in the background folder under your NioZy config directory.
terminal.backgroundPickNotImage: Please choose a valid image file
terminal.idleAnimationDesc: Play a screen animation after the terminal has been idle; BlackHole works best with the WebGL renderer; NioZy requires WebGPU acceleration.
terminal.idleAnimationWtermDesc: Idle animations are not supported for Wterm; switch back to Xterm to enable.
terminal.welcomePageDesc: When enabled, shows a welcome animation on startup if no terminal session needs restoring, instead of opening a default terminal. Also shown when all tabs are closed.

ssh.title: SSH
ssh.description: Built-in ssh2 terminal, key exchange algorithms, disconnect alerts, SCP transfer, and scp.exe detection
ssh.useBuiltinSsh2: Use built-in SSH2 for SSH connections
ssh.useBuiltinSsh2Desc: When enabled, in-app terminals connect via the ssh2 library with saved passwords—no system ssh.exe required (useful for older OpenSSH such as Windows Server 2016)
ssh.connectTimeoutSecondsDesc: Maximum wait time when establishing SSH connections ({{min}}–{{max}} s); applies to OpenSSH, built-in SSH2 terminals, and SCP/SFTP transfers
ssh.kexAlgorithmsDesc: Used by the built-in SSH2 terminal and SCP/SFTP transfers. Only checked algorithms are offered, in list order.
ssh.alertOnDisconnectDesc: When enabled, background (non-active) SSH terminal tabs show a notification when the session ends
ssh.scpTransferEnabledDesc: Adds Open transfer in the SSH tab context menu to upload/download files via scp
ssh.checkScpDesc: Verify scp.exe is available on PATH (OpenSSH client)
ssh.scpNotFound: scp.exe not found on PATH. Install Windows OpenSSH Client or Git for Windows.

shell.title: SHELL
shell.description: Terminal shell output and interaction (emoji, link highlight, and open)
shell.ohMyPoshEnabledDesc: Inject bundled Oh My Posh and posh-git into pwsh for prompt styling
shell.ohMyPoshThemeDesc: Choose a bundled prompt theme; applies to new pwsh terminals
shell.emojiNativeRenderingDesc: Uses the Unicode 11 width table so emoji and wide characters render correctly in the terminal
shell.terminalInlineImagesDesc: Display images inline: SIXEL and iTerm IIP on Xterm; Kitty graphics protocol when using Ghostty rendering. Use niozy-cat. Press Ctrl+K or run clear/cls to dismiss images
shell.highlightLinksDesc: Highlight http and https URLs in terminal output
shell.clickToOpenLinksDesc: Open a link in the default browser when you click it with the mouse
shell.highlightLogLevelsDesc: Color terminal lines by log level (e.g. ERROR, WARNING), similar to MobaXterm; works for SSH and local terminals
shell.shiftEnterNewlineDesc: When enabled, Shift+Enter or Ctrl+Enter inserts a newline in interactive CLIs (e.g. Claude, Cursor agent); Enter sends the message. Clicks on output no longer move the cursor to the end of the screen. In TUIs, hold Shift and drag with the left button to select; release to copy
shell.showTerminalIndexDesc: When enabled, shows an index number to the left of each terminal tab name in the sidebar
shell.enableTabDragDesc: When enabled, long-press a sidebar terminal tab for 2 seconds to enter drag mode and reorder tabs vertically
shell.restoreTerminalSessionOnRestart: Restore last terminal session on restart
shell.restoreTerminalSessionOnRestartDesc: Saves terminal tab layout and connection settings when the app closes and restores them on the next launch. Turning this off deletes the saved data
shell.showRestoreTerminalSessionLoadingAnimati: Show loading animation while restoring session
Session restore blocks startup; when enabled, a global loading animation is shown until restore completes
shell.commandReplayListDesc: Save terminal input sequences for one-click replay from the title bar command panel

preview.title: Preview
preview.description: Preview files and links from terminal output (Ctrl+click)
preview.imagePreviewDesc: Detect common image extensions; hover shows Ctrl+click hint; local shell only (not SSH)
preview.chartPreviewDesc: Detect .docx, .xlsx, .csv, .txt, .md, .pdf; render docx/xlsx/pdf inline, others as text
preview.linkPreviewDesc: Ctrl+click opens URL in an in-app tab (uses proxy from System settings); normal click still uses the system browser
preview.anyFilePreviewDesc: Preview other extensions as text, up to the first 1 MB
preview.ctrlClickHint: Hold Ctrl and left-click to preview
preview.sshNotSupported: File preview is not supported on SSH terminals
preview.truncatedNotice: Large file — showing first 1 MB only
preview.pageLoadFailedHint: Check your network connection, proxy settings, or whether the URL is correct.
preview.webviewHeadersDesc: Attach HTTP headers to every link-preview WebView request (rows with an empty name are ignored)
preview.webviewBrowsingDataDesc: Clear cache, cookies, local storage, and HTTP auth cache for link-preview WebViews
preview.webviewClearConfirmDesc: This removes cookies, cache, and local storage for link preview. Reopen or refresh open preview tabs for the change to take effect.
preview.webviewClearFailed: Failed to clear WebView browsing data
preview.webviewClearBrowserOnly: Clearing WebView data is only available in the desktop app
preview.documentRenderModeDesc: Engine for docx, xlsx, and csv previews. Mammoth converts to HTML; js-preview keeps richer layout.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: Memory and background resource tuning for inactive terminal tabs
performance.inactiveTabOptimizationDesc: When enabled, inactive tabs with no interaction for 5 minutes unmount the terminal view and free xterm/wterm memory. PTY sessions stay connected; switching back rebuilds the view and replays buffered output
performance.inactiveTabSleepDesc: When enabled, turns on Chromium background throttling and pauses live PTY streaming for inactive tabs to reduce usage. Switching back resumes streaming (restart the app for full command-line throttling effect)
performance.superPowerSavingDesc: Keeps only the active tab's terminal mounted; Xterm temporarily uses DOM rendering. Inactive tabs end their PTY and unmount the view; switching back respawns from saved options (local shell sessions restart; SSH reconnects)

drawing.title: Drawing
drawing.description: Enable Excalidraw and Draw.io entries in the sidebar
drawing.excalidrawEnabledDesc: Show an Excalidraw button in the sidebar; opens the editor in the main panel
drawing.drawioEnabledDesc: Show a Draw.io button in the sidebar; opens the offline diagram editor in the main panel

filesystem.title: File system
filesystem.description: Local file tree preview, context menu open actions, and external programs
filesystem.localFilesystemEnabledDesc: Show the File system tab in the sidebar when enabled
filesystem.modernFilesystemUiEnabledDesc: Split layout with a folder tree on the left and file browser on the right; supports list and grid views
filesystem.imagePreviewDesc: When enabled, click or double-click an image file to preview it in a dialog
filesystem.openWithVsCodeDesc: Show this item in the file tree context menu (on by default)
filesystem.openWithCursorDesc: Show this item in the file tree context menu (on by default)
filesystem.programPathPlaceholder: Leave empty to auto-detect, or set the full path to code.exe / Cursor.exe
filesystem.customOpenersDesc: Set a label and executable path; entries appear in the file tree context menu
filesystem.customNotFound: No executable at the given path
filesystem.repoManagementEnabledDesc: Show the Repositories tab in the sidebar when enabled
filesystem.gitPathPlaceholder: Leave empty to auto-detect, or enter the full path to git.exe

statistics.title: Usage statistics
statistics.description: Locally records app usage time and terminal activity; data is stored in statistic.json
statistics.enabledDesc: Records usage duration, terminal tab open/close counts, and commands entered on this device
statistics.showStatusBarDesc: Shows a statistics button to the left of Search; click to view stats
statistics.clearConfirmDesc: This removes lifetime and today’s statistics. This cannot be undone.

reminder.title: Reminders
reminder.description: Manage reminders, notification style, and custom alert image
reminder.enabledDesc: Shows a reminder button in the title bar and enables scheduling
reminder.desktopPetEnabledDesc: Show a floating pet on the desktop; drag to move. Double-click or right-click the menu to show/hide the main window
reminder.petScaleDesc: Desktop pet display scale (25%–200%); 50% is the default size (96×104 px)
reminder.petImportDesc: Import a Petdex WebP spritesheet (1536×1872) into the pets folder; auto-number from 0 if name is empty
reminder.petEmpty: No pets imported yet; a placeholder button is shown on the desktop
reminder.petImportInvalidName: Name may only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens
reminder.petImportNameExists: A pet with this name already exists
reminder.petDeleteConfirm: Delete pet "{{name}}" and its spritesheet? This cannot be undone.
reminder.petBuiltinReadonly: This is a built-in pet bundled with NioZy and it cannot be deleted.
reminder.petRandomStateDesc: When enabled, randomly switches animation row every 10 seconds
reminder.systemNotificationDesc: Also show Windows Notification Center alerts when a reminder is due
reminder.notifyModeDesc: Choose in-app toast or dialog alerts
reminder.soundEnabledDesc: Play a sound when a reminder is due
reminder.toastDurationSecDesc: How long toast alerts stay visible, in seconds (toast mode only)
reminder.customImageDesc: JPG, PNG, or GIF shown in dialog alerts
reminder.imagePickNotImage: Selected file is not a valid image

system.title: System
system.launchOnStartupDesc: Start NioZy when you sign in to Windows
system.minimizeToTrayDesc: Hide to the system tray when clicking the close button
system.reloadEnvironmentDesc: Pulls the latest PATH and other variables from the OS without restarting NioZy. Applies only to new terminals; reopen tabs or refresh PATH inside existing shells.
system.settingsBackupDesc: Export all current settings (including custom connections) as JSON, or import from a JSON file to replace the current configuration. Vault variables are not included in exports.
system.updateAvailableDesc: You are on {{current}}. Version {{latest}} is available. Download and install now?
system.aboutDesc: Terminal workbench with built-in AI copilot — Electron, React, xterm.js, and Windows ConPTY.

ai.title: AI features
ai.description: Configure the AI chat sidebar and model provider. Runtime listens on 127.0.0.1 only. API keys may be plain text or vault references like ${OPENAI_API_KEY} (secret variables recommended).
ai.sidebarEnabledDesc: Show the AI chat sidebar on the right. Sending messages requires an API key for the selected provider (optional for local Ollama).
ai.attachmentsEnabledDesc: When on, the + button in the AI sidebar lets you add local images or files (drag-and-drop and paste also work). Requires a vision or multimodal model.
ai.agentEnabledDesc: Show the Agent entry in the sidebar and new-connection menu when enabled.
ai.agentGroupDesc: Configure the NioZy Agent entry and logging behavior.
ai.agentLogLevelDesc: Controls the log level emitted by the niozy-agent process.
ai.agentMaxTokensDesc: Sets the maximum output tokens allowed per NioZy Agent model request. This is passed both as the runtime -max-tokens flag and in request config.
ai.agentLogToFileDesc: When enabled, logs are written to a file; otherwise they only go to the terminal.
ai.agentLogFileDesc: Defaults to niozy-agent.log under the TMP directory, or set a custom absolute path.
ai.agentLogFilePickFailed: Failed to choose the Agent log file
ai.agentBinaryDesc: Detect and download the latest NioZy Agent release into configPath/niozy-agent-bin.
ai.agentBinaryPathPlaceholder: Click Detect to show the resolved Agent path
ai.agentBinaryStatusFailed: Failed to detect the Agent binary status
ai.agentBinaryOverwriteConfirm:
A local Agent binary was detected at {{path}}.
Continuing will write the latest version to {{targetPath}}.
Continue with the update?
ai.agentBinaryDownloadFailed: Failed to download the Agent binary: {{error}}
ai.sidebarWidthDesc: Width of the AI chat sidebar. Takes effect immediately.
ai.runtimePortDesc: Local Copilot Runtime listen port on 127.0.0.1 (default 6173). Reconnect the AI sidebar after changing.
ai.providerDesc: Choose which AI service to connect to.
ai.modelDesc: Pick a common model or enter a custom model name below (must match your API).
ai.modelCustomPlaceholder: Custom model name, e.g. qwen-plus or endpoint id
ai.baseUrlDesc: API base URL. Defaults are filled when switching providers; edit if needed.
ai.apiKeyDesc: API key for the provider, or ${VAR} from Settings → Vault (use the database icon to insert). Resolved when Copilot Runtime starts.
ai.apiKeyOptionalDesc: Local Ollama usually does not need an API key.

context.title: Context
context.description: Attach local rules and skills to AI chats. Enabled rules and imported skills are injected into every conversation.
context.rulesDesc: Markdown rule documents stored under ai/rules in your config directory. Only enabled rules are sent to the model.
context.skillsDesc: Create a subfolder per skill under ai/skills with a SKILL.md file. Use Import skill to open that folder, then Refresh skills.
context.noRules: No rules yet. Click Add rule to create one.
context.noSkills: No skills yet. Use Import skill to open the skills folder (each skill needs SKILL.md), then refresh.
context.createRuleDesc: Enter a rule name and Markdown body; saved under ai/rules.
context.ruleIdHint: Letters, numbers, underscores and hyphens only; used as the filename.
context.deleteRuleDesc: Delete rule "{{id}}"? This cannot be undone.

session.title: Manage sessions
session.description: Manage AI coding tool sessions. Open the session panel from the sidebar and resume past sessions.
session.agentSessionEnabledDesc: Show the Sessions entry in the sidebar when enabled
session.claudeCodeSessionEnabledDesc: Parse Claude Code history.jsonl and show sessions in the panel
session.openCodeSessionEnabledDesc: Parse opencode.db and show Open Code session history in the panel

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.description: AI coding workspace: launch a dev tool in a directory and browse files plus Git changes.
workspace.workspaceEnabledDesc: Show the Workspace entry below default shells in the new-connection menu; you can open multiple workspaces
workspace.gitWorkspaceEnabledDesc: Allow switching the right panel to uncommitted Git changes

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Manage Claude Code and Codex provider profiles. Enabling a provider overwrites that tool's local config files.
provider.empty: No providers for this tool yet. Click Add above to create one.
provider.name: Provider name
provider.namePlaceholder: For example: Official / Backup / Company Proxy

claude.authFieldDesc: Choose which auth environment variable name to write into config.
claude.modelMappingDesc: Display name affects Claude Code menus; request model is the actual server-side model.
claude.rawDesc: You can edit the raw JSON directly. When valid, it syncs back to the form above.
claude.rawInvalid: Raw JSON is invalid. Fix it before it can sync back to the form.

experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.description: Unstable features that may change or be removed
experimental.terminalEmulatorDesc: Choose the frontend terminal implementation: Xterm.js (default), Ghostty (ghostty-web WASM), or Wterm (experimental). Restart the app after switching.
experimental.jsSandboxEnabledDesc: Show an “Open sandbox” entry in the sidebar. Runs JavaScript in an isolated QuickJS WASM environment (not Node.js; no filesystem or network).
experimental.vncWebEnabledDesc: When enabled, you can add VNC connections and open them inside the app using noVNC.
experimental.vncAdaptiveScaleDesc: Scales the VNC viewport to fit the right panel (scale-to-fit).
experimental.vncHardwareAccelDesc: Uses a GPU-friendly Canvas rendering context for better draw performance. noVNC 1.7 renders with Canvas 2D (not WebGL). Reopen VNC connections after changing.
experimental.vncLocalCursorDesc: Render the mouse cursor on the client (lower latency). When off, uses the cursor drawn in the remote framebuffer. Reopen VNC connections after changing.
experimental.vncEncodingDesc: Preferred VNC framebuffer encoding; falls back if the server does not support it. Default is Tight. Reopen VNC connections after changing.

multiTerminal.title: Multi-terminal optimization
multiTerminal.description: Attach-PTY and multi-tab terminal performance settings. Xterm.js only.

experimental.ghosttyCoreEnabledDesc: Use the libghostty WASM build as Wterm's VT parser for fuller terminal emulation (grapheme clusters, full SGR, etc.). Restart open terminal tabs after switching.
experimental.ghosttyScrollbackLimitDesc: Maximum scrollback buffer lines for Ghostty Core (default 10000). Restart open terminal tabs after changing.
experimental.attachPtyRenderModeDesc: Use one shared Xterm instance per tab; switch tabs to attach different PTYs. Split panes still use multiple instances. Xterm.js only.
experimental.attachPtyTabSwitchDwellMsDesc: Skip snapshot save when leaving a tab before this dwell (ms); switching is immediate with no loading spinner. Range 0–5000, default 300.
experimental.attachPtyWebglContextPoolDesc: Share one WebGL slot for the Attach-PTY host; tab switches do not release or recreate the context per terminalId.
experimental.attachPtyScrollbackOffloadDesc: On detach, move scrollback to side storage and clear the xterm buffer; restore on re-attach to reduce memory with many tabs.

muxCore.title: NioZy Mux Core
muxCore.description: Local PTYs are composed into one ANSI stream by niozy-mux-core and rendered in a single xterm (1/2/4 panes). Mutually exclusive with Attach-PTY; SSH not supported.

experimental.muxCoreEnabledDesc: When enabled, you can open Mux terminal tabs (build niozy-mux-core first). Xterm.js and local shells only.
experimental.muxPaneCountDesc: Layout for new Mux tabs: 1 full screen, 2×1 side-by-side, 1×2 stacked, or 4 in a 2×2 grid.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.description: Hardware acceleration, sandbox, transparency, and status bar monitoring
advanced.hardwareAccelerationDesc: On by default; restart the app for full effect
advanced.webGpuAccelerationDesc: Enables the WebGPU API in Chromium; requires hardware acceleration; restart the app for full effect
advanced.disableSandboxDesc: When on, renderer sandbox is off; restart the app to apply
advanced.statusBarLiveStats: Live system info in status bar
advanced.statusBarLiveStatsDesc: When off, stops polling CPU/memory to reduce UI updates
advanced.statusBarPollPriorityDesc: Refresh interval for CPU, memory, and battery stats only
advanced.statusBarBatteryDesc: Show battery level and charging state to the right of RAM in the status bar (desktops show 100%)
advanced.shellContextMenuDesc: Adds “Open with NioZy” to folder and folder-background context menus, opening a new PowerShell tab in that directory
advanced.preserveWindowBoundsDesc: Saves size and position when you close the window; if maximized on close, starts maximized next time
advanced.resourceAutoDegrade: Detect resource usage and suggest downgrade
advanced.resourceAutoDegradeDesc: When on, monitors this app's CPU usage; shows a bottom-right prompt above 50% with a one-click switch to DOM rendering, Attach-PTY mode, and inactive tab optimization

p2p.title: Encrypted communication
p2p.description: LAN peer-to-peer encrypted chat, file transfer, and discovery
p2p.enabledDesc: Shows the chat entry in the sidebar and listens on the communication port
p2p.portDesc: Default 6869; other NioZy clients discover and connect on this port
p2p.discoveryEnabledDesc: When off, you won't appear in scans; manual IP:port connections still work
p2p.chatDirectoryDesc: Local folder for messages and attachments

logging.title: Logging
logging.description: Main-process log switch, level, and file path
logging.enabledDesc: No log file is written when disabled
logging.levelDesc: Only writes messages at or above the selected level (DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR)
logging.filePathDesc: Leave empty to use NioZy.log in the application working directory

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Electron accelerator format, e.g. CommandOrControl+T, Ctrl+Shift+C. Clear a field and press keys to record.
shortcuts.globalSingleKeyNotAllowed: Global shortcuts cannot be a single key. Combine with Ctrl, Alt, Shift, or similar.
shortcuts.globalShowAppDesc: If focused, send to background; otherwise show (keeps current page). Current: {{current}}
shortcuts.globalScreenshotDesc: Works while the app is in the background; requires Enable Screenshot in Assistive. Clear to unset. Current: {{current}}

vault.title: Vault
vault.description: Store secrets encrypted; reference in connections with
vault.encryptionKeyDesc: Default NioZy MD5 ({{hint}}). Place a 32-char key at %USERPROFILE%/.config/NioZy/niozy.key.
vault.keepSecretPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep existing secret
vault.vaultEmpty: Vault is empty; add variables in Settings first

connections.title: Connections
connections.description: Built-in shells, custom commands, SSH, RDP, WSL, Telnet, and PuTTY
connections.addCustomDesc: Custom command, SSH, RDP, WSL, Telnet, or PuTTY
connections.editCustomDesc: Update the connection settings in this dialog and save
connections.setDefaultTerminalDesc: Used when creating terminals, shortcuts, and on startup
connections.wslLaunchHint: Starts wsl.exe in an in-app terminal; leave distribution empty for the WSL default.
connections.telnetLaunchHint: Starts the built-in Telnet client in an in-app terminal using an npm Telnet library; no Windows Telnet optional feature required.
connections.ftpLaunchHint: Opens an FTP transfer panel in the right area. Default timeout is 10 seconds and supports FTP, FTPS, active, and passive modes.
connections.puttyLaunchHint: Launches the PuTTY GUI (putty.exe); does not open inside the in-app terminal.
connections.rdpLaunchHint: Uses the system Remote Desktop Connection (mstsc); does not open inside the in-app terminal.
connections.vncLaunchHint: Opens an in-app VNC viewer (requires Enable VNC Web under Settings → Experimental).
connections.name: Name
connections.sshDynamicPasswordHint: You must enter the server's current one-time password when connecting; the login password is the saved password above plus this value.
connections.sshStartupScriptHint: Runs line by line after SSH connects successfully. One bash command per line; supports ${vault} variables.

markdownEditor.fileTooLarge: Markdown file exceeds 10MB and cannot be opened

tab.terminalScreenshotDesc: Export the current terminal view as an image. Choose format, color scheme, and watermark.
tab.closeTerminalDesc: Close "{{title}}"? The process will end and unsaved output will be lost.
tab.editTitleDesc: Custom label in sidebar and status bar. Empty or default restores "{{defaultTitle}}".
tab.dropDirectoryFailed: Could not switch to that path
tab.dropDirectoryUnsupported: Local paths cannot be dropped onto SSH terminals
tab.addToGroupDesc: Organize this terminal tab into a group. Pick an existing group or create a new one.
tab.editGroupNameDesc: Change how this group appears in the sidebar.
tab.closeGroupDesc: Close group "{{name}}"? All {{count}} terminal tab(s) in this group will be closed and their processes ended.

commandPalette.title: Command palette
commandPalette.placeholder: Type a command… (help, /help, /all for all commands)
commandPalette.helpTip: Type help, /help, or /all to list all commands
commandPalette.unavailable: This command cannot run in the current context
commandPalette.subPanelHint: ↑↓ select · Enter confirm · Esc go back

scp.title: SCP transfer — {{title}}
scp.desc: {{user}}@{{host}} · local on the left, remote on the right
scp.descGeneric: Local files on the left, remote server on the right
scp.passwordAuthHint: SCP with password login may require interaction; public key login is recommended
scp.refreshAfterTransferFailed: Upload succeeded but could not refresh the remote list. Click Refresh.
scp.dropToUploadHint: Release to upload to the current remote folder
scp.dropDirectorySkipped: Folders cannot be uploaded yet; skipped: {{name}}
scp.dropNoFiles: Could not read dropped file paths

ftp.descGeneric: Local files on the left, FTP server on the right
ftp.selectLocalTarget: Choose a local target folder first
ftp.transferIdle: Upload files, or download files and folders

appMetrics.title: App resource usage
appMetrics.description: Per-process working set and CPU usage for this app

statusPanel.title: Status panel
statusPanel.subtitle: System and runtime overview
statusPanel.handleAria: Drag to expand or collapse the status panel

chat.disabled: Enable encrypted communication in Settings first
chat.newChatDesc: Enter target IP and port to start encrypted communication
chat.noSessions: No sessions yet. Scan or start a new chat.
chat.handshakeFailedDesc: The peer is online but the encrypted session could not be restored. You can clear the local session key and start a new handshake.
chat.handshakeFailedDescWithError: The peer is online but the handshake failed: {{error}}. You can retry the key handshake.
chat.peerUnreachable: Cannot reach the peer. Confirm they are online and the IP/port is correct.
chat.offlineInputPlaceholder: Peer is offline. Messaging is disabled.
chat.historyClearConfirmDesc: This permanently deletes local chat messages and attachment files for this conversation. This cannot be undone.
chat.noMessagesYet: No messages yet. Type below to start chatting.
chat.deleteConversationConfirmDesc: This permanently removes the conversation with {{name}}, including all local messages and attachment files. This cannot be undone.

muxTerminal.resizeHintGrid: Arrow keys to resize · Esc to exit

toast.screenshotCaptureFailed: Export failed: could not capture terminal screenshot
toast.loggingEnabled: Logging enabled. Main-process output is written at the selected level.
toast.hardwareAccelerationRestart: Hardware acceleration saved. Quit and restart the app for it to take effect.
toast.smoothFontsRestart: Smooth fonts saved. Quit and restart the app for it to take effect.
toast.smoothScrollingRestart: Smooth scrolling saved. Quit and restart the app for it to take effect.
toast.webGpuAccelerationRestart: WebGPU acceleration saved. Quit and restart the app for it to take effect.
toast.disableSandboxRestart: Sandbox setting saved. Quit and restart the app for it to apply.
toast.shellContextMenuFailed: Could not update Explorer context menu. Check that your user can write to the registry.
toast.shellContextMenuDuplicateName: Another custom command with the same name already has Explorer context menu enabled. Disable it or rename this connection.
toast.connectionContextMenuFailed: Could not update the custom command Explorer context menu. Check that your user can write to the registry.
toast.updateCheckFailed: Could not check for updates. Check your network and try again.
toast.updateDownloadFailed: Failed to download or launch the installer
toast.settingsImportInvalidJson: The selected file is not valid JSON
toast.pomodoroCompleteSubtitle: Focus session complete — keep it up!
toast.scpTransferDisabled: Enable SCP transfer under Settings → SSH first
toast.splitTerminalMax: Each terminal tab can have at most 4 panes
toast.splitTerminalUnknown: Cannot split: missing spawn options to reuse
toast.cloneTerminalUnknown: Cannot clone: missing spawn options to reuse
toast.restartAsAdminUnsupported: Restart as administrator is only available for local PowerShell, CMD, or pwsh tabs
toast.terminalEmulatorRestart: Terminal emulator changed. Restart the app for it to take effect.
toast.ghosttyCoreRestart: Ghostty Core changed. Restart the app for it to take effect.
toast.attachPtyRenderRestart: Attach-PTY render mode changed. Restart the app for it to take effect.
toast.resourceAutoDegradePrompt: This app is using about {{percent}}% CPU (above {{threshold}}%). Consider performance downgrade to reduce lag.
toast.resourceAutoDegradeApplied: Switched to DOM rendering with Attach-PTY and inactive tab optimization enabled.
toast.resourceAutoDegradeFailed: Failed to save performance downgrade settings.

terminal.inactiveOptimized: This tab was optimized: no activity for 5+ minutes, the terminal view was unloaded to save memory. Switch back to restore.
terminal.superPowerSavingIdle: Super power saving: this tab's terminal and PTY are suspended. Switch back to restore.
terminal.sshDeferredIdle: This SSH connection requires a dynamic password. Switch away and back to this tab to enter it and connect.

electron.preloadMissing: Electron preload API not found. Run npm run start instead of opening the Vite URL in a browser.

ssh.dynamicPasswordDescription: Connecting to "{{name}}" requires the server's current one-time password.
